evals.prompt: ask me questions about the critical gaps one by one so i can understand the issues better and we can come to some decisions
evals.expected_output: Maps and ranks the unknowns by build-impact, asks exactly ONE question per turn with why-it-matters and a recommended default, locks each answer into a running ledger, never bundles questions.

evals.prompt: i want an app that takes a topic and audience and writes a complete five-day training email series. grill me on this, then build it
evals.expected_output: Grills serially on the architecture-fork questions first, detects convergence (doesn't over-grill), states the explicit autonomy handoff with locked constraints, writes decisions.md, then starts building without returning for already-answered questions.

evals.prompt: i need to clean up this 18TB drive of old backups but i'm nervous about it — help me figure out the approach
evals.expected_output: Recognizes irreversibility and makes risk posture a top-ranked question (non-destructive default, copy-not-move, dry-run first), captures it in the constraints section of the ledger before proposing any action.
